project_info.title: Mathematical Foundations for AI Engineering: Vectors in R^n & Span

outline.title: Mathematical Foundations for AI Engineering: Vectors in R^n & Span
outline.summary: Introduction to vectors, their operations, and the concept of span, with a focus on AI and Cybersecurity applications.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Introduction to Vectors: The Language of Data
outline.summary: Define vectors algebraically and geometrically, and introduce basic operations like addition and scalar multiplication.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Linear Combinations & Vector Space Axioms
outline.summary: Explain linear combinations as the core of AI models and introduce vector space axioms for mathematical consistency.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: The Concept of Span: Reach of Data
outline.summary: Define the span of vectors and its geometric interpretation, connecting it to data representation.

outline.title: Active Lab: Vector Operations & Span in Python
outline.summary: Overview of the Python lab, its objectives, and the tools used.

outline.title: Complexity Level 1: Basic Operations & Span Check
outline.summary: Demonstrate basic vector operations and span checks using NumPy for rapid prototyping.

outline.title: Complexity Level 2: Conceptual Span Check (Augmented Matrix)
outline.summary: Explain the equivalence between vector equations and augmented matrices for span consistency.

outline.title: Complexity Level 3: Advanced Span Analysis
outline.summary: Delve into linear independence, basis, dimension, and their practical application in span analysis.

outline.title: Real-World Applications: Vectors in AI & Cybersecurity
outline.summary: Connect vector concepts to practical applications in machine learning (embeddings, PCA) and cybersecurity (anomaly detection).
